primary_subject: Ruins of the Indus Valley Civilization — Mohenjo-daro

image_requests.prompt: Mohenjo-daro ancient archaeological site ruins, crumbling terracotta brick walls and platforms receding into dusty horizon, warm amber golden haze atmosphere, eerie stillness, low wide cinematic angle, late afternoon raking light, no people, desaturated warm earth tones, dramatic sky
image_requests.purpose: Full-bleed hero background — the silent abandoned city is the entire visual story: civilization at its peak, now rubble

html: JUST VANISHED
why: The ruins fill the entire 1280×720 frame without decoration — there is no graphic UI, no badge, no border. The crumbling brick structures of Mohenjo-daro do all the visual heavy lifting: they signal ancient, they signal scale, they signal something gone. Cinzel was chosen deliberately: its letterforms descend from Roman inscriptions carved centuries *after* the Indus Valley collapsed, which is a quiet irony perfectly matched to the philosophical sleep-channel tone. The gradient blacks out the bottom 58% of the frame to carve a pure dark platform so JUST VANISHED sits in pure white against near-black — guaranteed legible even when compressed to 168×94 on a phone screen. The amber dust haze layer is a whisper, not a shout: just enough warmth to give the image that dreamlike, soft archaeological stillness without fighting the text contrast.
title: Boring History for Sleep: The Mystery of the Indus Valley Civilization
